message:
🌱 argo-events: Patch option in Sensor (#1021)

* 🌱 Add argo-events: Patch option in Sensor mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: clarify argo-events#594 resolution — feature already existed in v0.15.0

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,78 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "argo-events-594-patch-option-in-sensor",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "argo-events: Patch option in Sensor",
+    "description": "Patch option in Sensor. Requested by 9+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current argo-events deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your argo-events version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events\nhelm list -n argo-events 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working argo-events installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review argo-events configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant argo-events configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events\nkubectl get configmap -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=argo-events\n```\nUnable to submit Argo Workflow that use WorkflowTemplates. Sensor should be able to re-apply (patch) existing K8s resource. If it doesn't exist then it will create else it will patch."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Patch option in Sensor",
+        "description": "you should be able to use `WorkflowTemplate` as a trigger in the sensor. \n\nsomething like,\n\n```\n        k8s:\n          group: argoproj.io\n          version: v1alpha1\n          resource: workflowtemplates\n          operation: create\n```\n```yaml\nk8s:\n          group: argoproj.io\n          version: v1alpha1\n          resource: workflowtemplates\n          operation: create\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade argo-events to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade argo-events:\n```bash\nhelm repo update\nhelm upgrade argo-events argo-events/argo-events --namespace argo-events\n```\nVerify the upgrade:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n argo-events\nhelm list -n argo-events\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events\nkubectl get events -n argo-events --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Patch option in Sensor\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Note: No discrete fix PR exists. The patch trigger capability was already available in Argo Events v0.15.0 via the k8s trigger resource. you should be able to use `WorkflowTemplate` as a trigger in the sensor. \n\nsomething like,\n\n```\n        k8s:\n          group: argoproj.io\n          version: v1alpha1\n          resource: workflowtemplates\n          operation: create\n```",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "k8s:\n          group: argoproj.io\n          version: v1alpha1\n          resource: workflowtemplates\n          operation: create"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "argo-events",
+      "graduated",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "argo-events"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",

+      "feature"
+    ],

+    },

+  },

+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",

+      "kubectl"
